description: Static landing page redesign for hardware.hackclub.com

dimensions.name: HTML Validity
dimensions.description: index.html parses without errors using html5validator or tidy
dimensions.command: cd /Users/jcohn/factory-projects/help-me-create-a-new-design-for-httphardwareha && python3 -c "from html.parser import HTMLParser; p=HTMLParser(); p.feed(open('index.html').read()); print('{\"score\": 1.0}')" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"score": 0.0}'

dimensions.name: Required Sections Present
dimensions.description: All 6 required sections (hero, current-programs, past-programs, gallery, help, community) present in HTML

dimensions.name: Hackclub Brand Compliance
dimensions.description: Page uses Phantom Sans font and Hackclub official colors (#ec3750, etc.)

dimensions.name: All Program Links Present
dimensions.description: All 9 program URLs (3 current + 6 past) are linked in the page

dimensions.name: Mobile Responsive
dimensions.description: Page has viewport meta tag and CSS media queries for mobile

dimensions.name: Scrolling Gallery Present
dimensions.description: Marquee/scrolling gallery animation CSS is present
